subcodes.first_line: O wondrous branch of the Divine Lote-Tree! When the morn of the Covenant shed its radiant light, and eyes were illumined by the rays of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع البدیع من السدره الرحمانیه چون صبح میثاق اشراق نمود و احداق بپرتو فیض
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
